text: 9 wonders of the Dolomites in Italy ✨🏔 Share these stunning photos with your friends.  1⃣ #LakeMolveno: Start your adventure at Lake Molveno, an alpine gem surrounded by lush forests and majestic mountains. A perfect place for hikers and water sports enthusiasts.  2⃣ #LakeBraies: Explore Lake Braies, nicknamed "the pearl of the Dolomites," whose crystal clear waters reflect the surrounding peaks. Don't miss a traditional boat ride for an unforgettable experience.  3⃣ #ValDiFunes: Immerse yourself in the beauty of the Funes Valley, where steep mountains and green pastures create an idyllic landscape. An ideal destination for hikers and photographers.  4⃣ #Vipiteno: Stroll through the streets of Vipiteno, a charming medieval town with colorful houses and narrow streets. Discover its rich cultural and architectural heritage.  5⃣ #GeislerAlm: Rejuvenate at Geisler Alm, a picturesque mountain hut with stunning views of the Dolomite peaks. An ideal place to relax after a long day of hiking.  6⃣ #SanGenesio: Take in the breathtaking views from San Genesio, a charming village perched on a green plateau. Take advantage of the many opportunities for hiking and outdoor activities.  7⃣ #GardenaPass: Cross the Gardena Pass, a spectacular mountain pass offering breathtaking views of the surrounding peaks. A must-see for road trip and cycling enthusiasts.  8⃣ #PuezOdleNaturePark: Discover the Puez-Odle Nature Park, a haven of biodiversity and stunning scenery. Hike through its forests, mountain pastures and impressive rock formations.  9⃣ #LacBraies: Admire once again the enchanting beauty of Braies Lake, a serene place that perfectly captures the essence of the Dolomites.  What is your favorite photo?
